title: helianthus arizonensis
intro: Helianthus arizonensis, also known as the Arizona sunflower, is a species of daisy-like flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Helianthus arizonensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
